posts.author: MoorvaleEvents_24
posts.text: 🎉 Big news for everyone! The annual Moorvale Garden Festival is finally happening this Saturday at the Green Fields Centre. There'll be live music, local crafts, and a huge food market with everything from fresh fruit to homemade cakes. Perfect day out for families and pet owners alike! 🌸🍕 #GardenFestival #MoorvaleEvents #CommunityDay
posts.explanation: This is a harmless community announcement promoting a public event, which falls within acceptable content.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
